title: Worse Apples
description: Make the apples bad. Stop having them be good.
body:
![Worse Apples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EQrEMtJO/images/fe8207d009b6c2c03efc2bf7dce6dd2d1a57af39.png)

Have you ever looked for a Bad Apple animated item pack, not found one, and wondered why? Have you ever wanted to cut down a tree, remove the leaves, and have anime silhouettes fall on you? Have you ever felt the urge to turn a full music video into a 16*105,152 image and put it in a video game, just for the memes? No? Well, tough beans, pal, I made this real anyway.

Replaces apples and golden apples with Bad Apple.
